w:r.w:t: 17 Complete AI & Codex Prompts to Build the World's Most Advanced
E-Commerce Frontend - Beating Amazon & Flipkart for 1000 Years
Next.js 15 | React 19 Server Components | TypeScript 5.5 | Tailwind CSS v4
Framer Motion 11 | Zustand 5 | React Query v5 | Apollo Client 4
Three.js + WebXR | Web Speech API | WebSocket + SSE | PWA | Playwright

Each of the 17 prompts is ready to paste into Cursor AI, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, or any AI coding tool. Every prompt specifies the exact file path, component API, state management connection, and backend API endpoint - so generated code slots directly into the ZENVY Go + Rust + Python + Node.js backend.
Cursor AI (recommended), Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codeium
Tailwind CSS v4 (CSS-first) + custom design tokens
Zustand 5 + Immer | React Query v5 | Apollo Client 4
Python FastAPI: LLM agent, recs, fraud, visual search
LCP < 1.2s | CLS = 0 | INP < 100ms (Core Web Vitals green)
Next.js 15 | TypeScript | Tailwind v4 | Design Tokens | Zustand
Next.js 15 production scaffold - complete ZENVY setup
Bootstrap a production-ready Next.js 15 App Router project for ZENVY.
Framework : Next.js 15.3 (App Router ONLY, never Pages Router)
React : 19 with Server Components + Server Actions
Styling : Tailwind CSS v4 (CSS-first in globals.css, no tailwind.config.js)
State : Zustand 5 + Immer | React Query v5 | Apollo Client 4
Forms : React Hook Form v7 + Zod v3
Tests : Vitest + React Testing Library + Playwright
Lint : ESLint 9 + Prettier + Husky + lint-staged + commitlint
ui/ <- Button, Input, Card, Badge, Modal, Tooltip, Toast
layout/ <- Header, Footer, Sidebar, MegaMenu, BottomNav
ai/ <- AIChat, VisualSearch, ARViewer, PersonalisedFeed, DealScore
apollo/ <- Apollo client setup + cache policies + type policies
api/ <- REST client for Go/Rust/Python backend services
store/ <- Zustand stores (cart, user, ui, wishlist, search)
types/ <- TypeScript types + GraphQL codegen output
images.remotePatterns: [S3 bucket, CDN] <- Cloudflare CDN domains
Custom fonts: display (Geist), body (Inter), mono (JetBrains Mono)
ZENVY design system - colors, typography, spacing, dark mode
Create the ZENVY design token system in src/styles/globals.css
.btn-primary: zenvy-500 bg, white text, hover zenvy-600, active scale-95
.btn-secondary: white bg, zenvy-500 border+text, hover zenvy-50 bg
.card: white bg, border, radius-md, shadow-card, hover shadow-elevated
.badge-deal: deal-red/10 bg, deal-red text, rounded-full, font-semibold
.input-field: full-width, border, radius-md, focus-ring zenvy-500, px-4 py-2.5
All semantic tokens must have dark variants
Cart, User, UI, Wishlist, Search stores with persistence
Create all 5 Zustand 5 stores for ZENVY in src/lib/store/.
Use Immer middleware + devtools in development.
CartItem: { variantId, productId, name, image, price(paise),
Persist: localStorage for guest, sync to server on login
Optimistic: update local state immediately, sync async
NO persistence (NextAuth session is source of truth)
Persist: localStorage guest -> sync on login
ALL 5 STORES: wrap mutations in immer produce()
add Redux DevTools in development only
export typed hooks: useCartStore, useUIStore etc.
Homepage - hero carousel, deal carousels, Suspense streaming, AI feed
Build the ZENVY Homepage at src/app/(main)/page.tsx.
Uses Next.js 15 Server Components + Suspense streaming.
Page: Server Component (no 'use client' on page level)
const [banner, categories, trending, flash] = await Promise.all([
Full-width 3-5 CMS slides, Framer Motion crossfade+slide
CTA button with UTM tracking params
Horizontal ProductCard scroll with deal badges
Shows 20 products with 'Why recommended' reason per card
Real-time view count badge via WebSocket /ws/trending
Skeletons match EXACT dimensions (zero layout shift)
PLP - infinite scroll, faceted filters, sort, URL state, compare
Build the ZENVY Product Listing Page (PLP) at
URL STATE: all filters managed via nuqs (type-safe URL params)
RENDERING: Server Component initial SSR (SEO), then client hydration
FILTER SIDEBAR (desktop left / mobile bottom sheet):
Categories: expandable tree, breadcrumb trail, selected highlighted
Dual-thumb slider (custom CSS, no heavy libs)
Min/max inputs synced bidirectionally to slider
Quick pills: Under Rs500 | Rs500-1000 | Rs1000-5000 | Rs5000+
Rating: star pills '4 stars & above', '3 stars & above'
Color: circular swatches with border on select
Size: pill buttons greyed if no results
Delivery: 'Get it today' | 'Get it tomorrow' | '2 days'
Toggle: grid view / list view (icon buttons top right)
Infinite scroll: IntersectionObserver on last card
Skeleton cards same dimensions as real cards
Active filter chips with x to remove each
Checkbox on each card: 'Add to Compare'
Floating compare bar slides up (Framer Motion) when 2+ selected
Filters: Framer Motion bottom sheet slide-up
URL SYNC: filter change -> URL replaceState (shareable + back-button safe)
PDP - media, 360, variants, EMI, AR, AI review summary, Q&A
Build the ZENVY Product Detail Page (PDP) at
Most important page - must be pixel-perfect.
generateMetadata: og:title, og:image, og:price, Product JSON-LD schema
experimental_ppr:true <- static shell instant, dynamic streamed
2. Thumbnail strip: 6 images + video thumbnail horizontal scroll
3. Image zoom: CSS transform on mousemove (no library)
4. 360 viewer: Three.js TextureSphere when product.has360 === true
Selling price: large bold deal-green if discounted
'Lowest price in 30 days' badge when applicable
Expand: bank table (Axis, HDFC, ICICI, SBI)
Color: image swatches (one image per color)
Size: pills greyed if OOS, size-guide modal
'Delivery by Mon Jun 3 FREE' or 'Rs49 delivery'
'Same day delivery available' badge if eligible
Low: 'Only 3 left!' amber (only if API confirms < 5 units)
OOS: 'Notify me when available' email capture
8. OFFERS: bank cashback + coupon codes + exchange offer
9. Description tabs: Overview | Specifications | In the Box
10. AI Review Summary (pros/cons chips + aspect ratings)
11. Reviews: histogram, verified filter, photo reviews, pagination
12. Q&A: top questions + ask form + AI-suggested answer
Framer Motion slide-in from right, 400ms cubic-bezier easing
Items: image, name, variant attrs, qty stepper, price, remove
Coupon: POST /api/v1/coupons/validate -> show green discount line
Price breakdown: Subtotal | Discount | Delivery | GST | Total
Empty: illustration + 'Your cart is empty' + 'Explore products'
CHECKOUT PAGE (/checkout) - Framer AnimatePresence between steps:
'Add new address' form (React Hook Form + Zod):
Inline validation with accessible error messages
Items with images, quantities, prices, delivery dates
Group by seller (multi-seller orders clearly labelled)
Price breakdown with per-item GST detail
a) UPI: enter ID -> validate, show QR code, saved UPIs
b) Cards: Razorpay hosted iframe (PCI-DSS), auto-format,
save card option (tokenised, never raw PAN)
c) Netbanking: 20 top banks grid + search
d) Wallets: Paytm, PhonePe, Amazon Pay, Mobikwik
f) COD: orders under Rs10,000 only
All card fields in Razorpay/Stripe iframe (never touch raw PAN)
CSRF token via NextAuth on all POST requests
Idempotency-Key UUID header on every payment request
4 variants, AI deal score, wishlist animation, quick-add, skeleton
Most rendered component - must be fast and pixel-perfect.
Top-left: badges DEAL | NEW | 30% OFF | BESTSELLER | TRENDING #N
Hover: scale 1.03 via Framer Motion whileHover
Quick-add button fades in from bottom on hover
Price: selling(green if discounted), MRP strikethrough, % badge
'FREE delivery by Mon 3 Jun' text-xs text-deal-green
Deal Score bar: 0-40 gray 'Fair' | 41-70 amber 'Good deal'
Trending badge with rank number if rank prop given
Framer Motion: opacity 0->1, y 8->0 on card hover
React.memo: only re-renders when product data changes
Only import specific Lucide icons (never import *)
Include: Storybook stories for all variants, Vitest unit tests
Autocomplete, voice (6 Indian languages), visual, NLQ, ARIA
STATES: idle | focused | typing | voice-listening | visual-uploading
Keyboard: arrows navigate, Enter selects, Escape closes
RECENT SEARCHES (shown on focus, empty query):
Max 8 items with x remove each
TRENDING SEARCHES (shown on focus, empty query):
Mic icon button in search bar
Supports: Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Bengali, Marathi
While listening: animated CSS soundwave rings
a) Upload image (drag-drop or file picker)
Show: 'We searched for: [parsed]' chip with edit option
MOBILE: full-screen search overlay on icon tap
Sticky header, mega menu, notifications, smart scroll, mobile bottom nav
Build the ZENVY sticky Header with mega-menu.
Right: 'Download App' | Language selector | IN flag
Location pin 'Deliver to Mumbai 400001' (editable pincode popover)
Cart icon + item count badge (Zustand cartStore.itemCount())
Tabs: All | Electronics | Fashion | Home | Beauty |
Close on mouse-leave with 200ms delay (prevent flicker)
My Profile | Orders | Wishlist | ZENVY Plus |
Active: zenvy-500 color + scale 1.1 + filled icon
CSS: --header-height:64px used by layout for sticky offset
Shopping Agent | AR Try-On | Personalisation | Deal Score
SSE streaming chat, product cards in chat, voice, connects to Claude backend
Build the ZENVY AI Shopping Assistant floating widget.
Connects to Python FastAPI LLM backend (Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514).
Floating button bottom-right, Framer Motion bounceIn on load
Desktop: fixed bottom-right, 400px wide x 600px tall
Status: green dot Online | grey Offline
a) User: right-aligned zenvy-500 bubble white text
b) AI text: left-aligned white bubble, STREAMING token by token
c) AI product cards: 1-3 ProductCard (compact) inline in chat
d) Action chips: [View product] [Add to cart] [Compare] buttons
f) Error: red icon + 'Something went wrong. Try again.'
Mic: Web Speech API -> transcript into input
Camera: attach image -> visual search endpoint
Backend stores conversation in Redis (24h TTL)
'Continue previous chat?' if session exists on reopen
Include: useAIAssistant hook, SSE reader, full TypeScript types
In-browser AR: face tracking (glasses), surface placement (furniture)
Build ZENVY AR Try-On with WebXR API + Three.js r168.
No app download needed - works in Chrome/Safari browser.
Fashion: glasses, watches, jewellery (face landmark tracking)
Furniture: sofas, TVs, art (surface hit-test placement)
1. User clicks 'Try in Your Space' on PDP
7. Render Three.js scene over camera feed
8. Place model on surface or face landmark
Map product model to face mesh UV coords
WebXR Hit Testing on horizontal planes
Pinch to scale, drag to reposition
AR UI OVERLAY (DOM Overlay on top of camera):
Back arrow: exit session + dispose Three.js renderer
Product name + price floating at bottom
FALLBACK: Three.js drag-to-rotate 3D viewer if WebXR unavailable
FALLBACK 2: 2D image gallery if camera denied
Why recommended, deal score bar, impression tracking, A/B experiment
Build the ZENVY Personalised Recommendation UI.
x button on each personalised card
Optimistic: Framer Motion exit animation, replace with next
score: 0-100 from dynamic pricing Python service
80px wide horizontal fill bar under price block
On PDP mount: store { product_id, name, image, price, slug }
Toast: 'We will notify you when the price drops!'
Core Web Vitals | Service Worker | WebSocket | Push
Images, fonts, scripts, skeletons, PPR, bundle size, virtualisation
Implement ALL performance optimisations across ZENVY.
blurDataURL from BlurHash (10x10 base64 tiny preview)
Generate server-side on upload, store as product.blur_hash
Cloudflare auto-serves WebP/AVIF via Image Resizing
const inter = Inter({ subsets:['latin'], display:'swap', preload:true })
next/font eliminates CLS from font swaps completely
Use variable fonts (one file for all weights)
Nothing blocks main thread on initial page load
Every data section needs a skeleton
Skeleton: exact width, height, margins of real content
NEVER display:none then show - always reserve exact space
Use animate-pulse with exact Tailwind dimension classes
export const experimental_ppr = true // PDP + PLP
Static shell instant (header, price frame, image frame)
Dynamic data (live price, stock, reviews) streamed via Suspense
Background refetch on window focus: cart, notifications only
Examples: review list, order history, seller listings
Offline mode, push notifications, live prices, stock, order updates
Build ZENVY as a full PWA with offline mode + WebSocket real-time.
Homepage: cached product data + 'You are offline' banner
Products: serve cached if previously visited
Heartbeat: ping 30s, close on 3 missed pongs
price.updated -> animate price on PDP (fade old, pulse new)
stock.low -> 'Only N left!' badge on PDP
stock.out -> grey Add to Cart, show Notify Me
Types: order dispatched, price drop, flash deal start
NextAuth v5 | WebAuthn | Biometric | Playwright E2E
Phone OTP, Google, Apple, passkey/biometric, JWT refresh, middleware
Build authentication for ZENVY using NextAuth.js v5.
On login: fetch user profile + roles from Go backend
Store: access_token, refresh_token, user_id, tier, seller_id
If expiry < 60s: silently call refresh_token endpoint
Expose access_token + user.id + user.tier to client
Tab 1: Phone OTP (enter number -> OTP input, auto-submit at 6 digits)
New user after OTP: collect name + email
Full journey, performance, a11y, visual regression, 5 browsers
Build Playwright E2E test suite for ZENVY.
Pixel 7 mobile Chrome, iPhone 15 mobile Safari
globalSetup: seed DB, create test users, fake payment tokens
click search bar -> type 'Samsung Galaxy S25'
click first card -> expect PDP URL + H1 visible
price range filter -> all results within range
visual search: upload test image -> results appear
expect product cards in chat bubble
assert 0 critical violations: homepage, PLP, PDP, checkout
CI/CD: block merge on any E2E failure
upload report + screenshots as GitHub Actions artifacts
Every layer mapped to technology and competitive advantage
Zero runtime type errors across all components
Zero-bundle server rendering for all data fetch
CSS-first, dark mode, consistent design system
Cart, UI, wishlist - instant, no boilerplate
Smart cache, background refetch, optimistic UI
Phone OTP + Google + passkey, JWT auto-refresh
Live prices, stock, orders, AI chat tokens
In-browser AR try-on, no app download needed
Photo -> product match via Weaviate KNN
Auto WebP/AVIF, BlurHash placeholder, zero CLS
Component gallery + pixel-diff on every PR
Server-side flags, no client bundle impact
Edge network, instant rollback, per-PR preview
Auth, geo redirects, personalisation at edge
Build + lint + test + deploy on every PR
Build in this exact order - each phase ships real value
Prompt 1: Bootstrap Next.js 15 + Prompt 2: design tokens
Prompt 10: Header with mega-menu and mobile bottom nav
Prompt 4: Homepage with ISR, hero, Suspense streaming
Prompt 5: Product Listing Page - filters, infinite scroll
Prompt 6: Product Detail Page - variants, price, EMI, reviews
Prompt 16: Auth - phone OTP + Google OAuth2 + middleware
Prompt 9: SearchBar with autocomplete, voice (6 languages), visual
Prompt 8: ProductCard all variants with deal score and AI badges
Prompt 11: AI Shopping Assistant with SSE token streaming
Prompt 12: AR Try-On with WebXR + Three.js + MediaPipe
Prompt 13: Personalised feed, deal score, impression tracking
Prompt 15: PWA offline mode + WebSocket real-time layer
Seller dashboard: listing, analytics, bulk upload, ad manager
Live commerce: WebRTC stream + in-stream buy + live chat
Social: group buy, shared wishlist, influencer storefronts
Gamification: spin-the-wheel, badges, streaks, mystery boxes
Account: orders, returns, reviews, loyalty, notifications
Prompt 17: Full Playwright E2E suite (5 browsers + a11y)
Storybook + Chromatic visual regression CI on every PR
i18n: Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Bengali, Marathi
Emotion-aware UI: adapt layout from engagement signals
Full voice-only shopping journey (zero touch required)
VR commerce: WebXR immersive-vr metaverse ZENVY store
Holographic display when light-field hardware is available
Neural interface commerce layer (AR headset first step)
Next.js 15 | React 19 | TypeScript | Tailwind v4 | Framer Motion | Zustand | React Query | Apollo | Three.js | WebXR | PWA | Playwright
